# t22.4 - Re-run conformance review after final PM closure

## Summary

Re-ran the final completeness gate after the last surface-proof tester rerun `t21.4.2`.
That tester evidence materially improves the package: the DB2 primary-lane proof now covers
the remaining documentation, primitive-launcher, alternate-surface, and image-surface inventory
that had kept `t21.3` red.

The gate still remains FAIL because the named upstream dependency for this rerun, `t21.5-pm.md`,
has not been published. Conformance can tighten requirement status from direct tester evidence,
but it cannot infer a fresh PM parity verdict from an unpublished rerun artifact.

## Deliverables

- [migration-summary.md](./migration-summary.md) - refreshed binary conformance verdict for the post-`t21.4.2` state
- [checkpoints/tasks-to-impl.yaml](./checkpoints/tasks-to-impl.yaml) - aggregate completeness checkpoint updated to include `t21.4.2`
- [checkpoints/traceability-matrix.yaml](./checkpoints/traceability-matrix.yaml) - traceability package refreshed for the latest evidence delta

## Verdict

- Gate: FAIL
- Critical findings: 1
- High findings: 1

## Findings

1. CRITICAL - Missing upstream parity-closure artifact. `t22.4` depends on `t21.5`, but no `t21.5-pm.md` artifact exists for the post-`t21.4.2` evidence bundle.
2. HIGH - The latest available PM verdict remains `t21.3`, which still leaves `16` requirements partial across the remaining user-visible behavior and anonymous-access coverage set.

## Why The Verdict Did Not Flip

- `t21.4.2` is enough to retire the older surface-family blocker carried by `t21.3`: the repaired docs assets, primitive launchers, alternate routes, and image-mode pages are now directly re-proven on the DB2 primary lane.
- That evidence improvement is enough to promote `REQ-001`, `REQ-026`, `REQ-027`, and `REQ-028` to complete in the aggregate conformance traceability package.
- It is not enough to bypass the missing upstream PM rerun artifact or to infer that PM accepted the remaining partial user-visible behaviors after reviewing the new evidence.

## Validation Basis

- Reviewed `t21.3-pm.md` as the latest available PM parity verdict.
- Reviewed `t21.4.2-tester.md` as the latest DB2 primary-lane surface-proof evidence delta.
- Verified that no `t21.5*` artifact exists under `artifacts/`.
- Re-synchronized the completeness summary and aggregate checkpoints to the current blocker state.

## Test Results

- Command: artifact review only; no executable validation command was available for the missing upstream PM artifact dependency
- Passed: 0
- Failed: 0
- Skipped: 1
